rawContent: {"stage":"build","insights":[{"kind":"convention","text":"Label management logic lives in the engine repo (aharonyaircohen/Kody-ADE-Engine), not in tester/repo-codebase repos. Tester repos only observe and verify.","scope":"label lifecycle"},{"kind":"lesson","text":"Verification-only pipeline stages confirm behavior by observing external state (GitHub labels) rather than by running local code assertions.","scope":"pipeline verification"}]}
